class.name: GeneratorCircleShape2D
class.brief_description: A query generator that generates a circle around each [QueryContext2D].
class.description: A query generator that generates a circle around each [QueryContext2D].

members.member: Sets the angle of the arc in degrees.
The physics layers the hotizontal casting [b]scans[/b]
Reference [QueryContext2D], where a circle will generate on each of these positions.
Radius of the circle that expands from [member circle_center].
The space between each point around the circle.
Cast rays or shapes outwards from each context and align the [QueryItem2D] on it. Useful for detecting walls.
